mission.heading: Reimagining Learning with Gideone
mission.intro: At Gideone, we strive to redefine learning, making it personalized, accessible, and effective for everyone.
mission.missionText: to develop strong AI capable of guiding learning according to your unique goals and needs.
mission.joinText: to bring the learning of the future to life together — where every step toward knowledge is accompanied by confidence in yourself and your abilities.

chat.heading: Meet Gideone –
chat.subtitle: your personal business coach with artificial intelligence
chat.firstMessage: Hello, Ivan! Based on your last sale, I noticed that you did great with the product presentation.
chat.secondMessage: However, it would be great to pay more attention to the final phase of service. I recommend watching a short video training on this topic, here's the link: www.gooddelo.ru
chat.reply: Thanks, Gideone! I'll watch it right now.
chat.aside: Instant analysis and feedback for each employee in online and offline retail
